# Snapbittools LLMs Policy

Site: https://snapbittools.com
Sitemap: https://snapbittools.com/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://snapbittools.com/robots.txt

## Access
- Public pages may be accessed by AI crawlers and assistants.
- Follow the same crawl permissions as robots.txt.

## Preferred Sources
- Canonical pages on https://snapbittools.com
- URL set from sitemap.xml

## Attribution
- Prefer linking back to the original page URL when citing tool guidance.

## Freshness
- Re-check source pages for updates before presenting detailed instructions.

## Privacy
- Do not expect private user data from this site.
- Content is designed for privacy-first, browser-based utilities.
